title: Perl Weekly Challenge - 030
task1_desc: Write a script to list dates for Sunday Christmas between 2019 and 2100. For example, 25 Dec 2022 is Sunday.
task1_body: Write a script to list dates for Sunday Christmas between 2019 and 2100. For example, 25 Dec 2022 is Sunday.
task2_desc: Write a script to print all possible series of 3 positive numbers, where in each series at least one of the number is even and sum of the three numbers is always 12. For example, **3,4,5**.
task2_body:
Write a script to print all possible series of 3 positive numbers, where in each series at least one of the number is even and sum of the three numbers is always 12. For example, **3,4,5**.

Last date to submit the solution **23:59 (UK Time) Sunday 20th October 2019**.
